title: Training Tips: Loose Leash Walking | San Diego Humane Society
raw_text: San Diego Humane Society loose leash walking protocol (2025 updated). Red Light/Green Light core technique: stop the moment leash tightens, resume when loose. Reward check-ins with eye contact. Front-clip harness recommended. No aversive tools (choke chains, prong collars, shock collars). Pile of treats exercise: 4-5 feet away, advance only on loose leash. If dog pulls, stop and wait for tension release. Goal: 3-minute walk with zero tension. Reward every 5 loose-leash moments.

metadata.query: leash pulling loose leash training evidence based
metadata.notes: San Diego Humane Society - accredited animal welfare organization, evidence-based protocols
